compiled_state.title: Update template header comment and verify all ci-dso-staged tests pass end-to-end
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: UPDATE

## What to do
Final verification and cleanup task after the llm-review implementation (e212-65af).

## Steps

### Step 1: Verify all ci-dso-staged tests pass
Run: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-dso-staged-template.sh
Run: bash tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh
Both must exit 0. Fix any failures before proceeding.

### Step 2: Verify YAML validity
Run: python3 -c 'import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open("plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml"))'
Must exit 0.

### Step 3: Verify no DSO plugin refs
Run: grep -n 'CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT\|read-config\.sh' plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
Must produce no output.

### Step 4: Verify SHA pinning
Run: grep 'claude-code-action' plugins/dso/templates/ci-dso-staged.yml
Output must contain a 40-character hex SHA (not @main, @v1, or any mutable tag).

### Step 5: Confirm .test-index entry
Run: grep 'ci-dso-staged.yml' .test-index
Must show both test files listed for the template.

## Acceptance criteria
- All tests pass (exit 0)
- YAML is valid
- No DSO plugin refs in template
- SHA is pinned (40-char hex)
- .test-index has both test files for ci-dso-staged.yml

## Files to modify
- No new files; verification and minor fixups only if tests reveal gaps
